title: Too Many Hats!
description: This mod adds several hats to vanilla Minecraft
body:
Too Many Hats! adds a huge collection of fun, stylish, and silly hats to Minecraft.
Craft, collect, and customize your look — because there’s no such thing as too many hats!
From a classy Top Hat to a colorful Helicopter Hat and a glowing Angel Halo, this mod adds new ways to express your style.

The mod is still in the testing phase.
